payload.title: Phase 1: single-tenant Express hub on public TLS
payload.description: Containerize src/server.js (node:22-slim, build better-sqlite3) and deploy a single instance to Fly.io with a persistent volume for .scope/, a real TLS hostname, and a custom domain. Verify long-lived SSE survives the platform proxy (no idle reaping) and that in-process EventEmitter fan-out works to a remote browser/iOS client over WAN. Disable loopback bypass + Bonjour/mTLS for the cloud build; keep them for LAN. Output: a reachable public hub one collaborator can hit. (From SCP-126; the first buildable step.)
